component.name: Mullvad VPN (CLI)
component.summary: Mullvad VPN client running inside a Flatpak sandbox.

description.p: This Flatpak provides the official Mullvad VPN command-line client inside a Flatpak sandbox.

It does not include or run a privileged VPN daemon. To establish a VPN tunnel you must run the official Mullvad daemon on the host system (outside Flatpak) and expose its RPC socket under /run/mullvad-vpn.
The Flatpak is useful on systems where you prefer Flatpak packaging for user tools, while keeping the actual VPN tunnel management in a system daemon with appropriate privileges.
This package is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mullvad VPN AB. It only repackages the official Mullvad binaries into a Flatpak manifest.
